title: Big K All in One BBQ Picnic Size FSC, 1x Disposable Instant BBQ
description: Product Description Big K single use all in one barbecues are the perfect quick and easy barbecue solution, no matter the occasion. If you’re looking for a disposable barbecue, try Big K’s All in One Picnic BBQ FSC for a portable barbecue that still packs a punch. They make these with an ultra deep foil tray and a generous base of our instant light FSC briquettes, so you’ll get a great performing barbecue with all the convenience of a disposable. Their all in ones are so quick and easy to use you can light them with a single match. They’re ready to cook on in as little as 20 minutes, and with 1 hour of cooking time, there’s plenty of time to get your grill on. Try Big K’s All in One Picnic BBQ FSC today for a disposable barbecue that won’t let you down when it counts. Please note all cooking times are approximate and depend on a range of factors, including quantity of charcoal and type of barbecue used, lighting method and weather conditions. Manufacturer Contact Information Unit 20 Millmead Rd Tottenham Hale London N17 9Qu
